canonical_answer: Grease-covered hands hold two metal ball joints side by side. The left joint features a clean black rubber boot with embossed lettering, while the right joint has a torn, dirty boot. Both parts display threaded studs at the bottom against a blurry gray concrete background.

question: Describe the visual sequence of automotive components shown, noting the transition from handheld parts to the vehicle assembly.
canonical_answer: At 4s, greasy hands hold a new ball joint next to an old rusty one; at 6s, rusty vehicle undercarriage components appear near a tire; at 10s, a black CV axle boot is visible near the brake caliper; at 18s, the suspension components appear again with visible corrosion.

question: Detail the condition and location of the mechanical parts visible throughout the video segments.
canonical_answer: At 4s, dirty hands display a torn rubber boot on an old ball joint; at 6s, rusty metal suspension components are visible near a tire; at 12s, a black rubber CV boot with metal clamps is visible; at 18s, the brake rotor and caliper assembly show surface discoloration.
